pkgmetadata.longdescription: [docspec] httpsgithub.comNiklasRosensteindocspec docspec-pythonA parser based on lib2to3 procuding [docspec][] data from Python source code.Examplefrom docspec_python import parse_python_moduleimport docspec, sysdocspec.dump_module(parse_python_module(sys.stdin, print_functionFalse), sys.stdout) docspec-python -p docspec docspec --dump-tree --multiple headmodule __init__ data __author__ data __version__ data __all__ data _ClassProxy data _mapper class Location data filename data lineno class Decoration---p aligncenterCopyright copy 2020, Niklas Rosensteinp
